components.description: High-confidence common identifiers and rails that should be available to most customers.
Umbrella privacy suite for personal data overlays across the more specific people-record packages.
Addresses, email, phone, contact details, geolocation, travel, household, and location-trail patterns.
Names, date-of-birth style identity references, person profiles, household, and individual master-data records.
Employment, HR, personnel, performance, grievance, right-to-work, time, leave, and workforce planning records.
Customer profiles, purchase history, loyalty, consent, support, complaint, chat, call-centre, and behaviour records.
Student, child, guardian, enrolment, special education, counselling, disciplinary, admissions, and scholarship records.
Biometric, disability, trade-union, political, ethnicity, nationality-origin, religious, sexual-orientation, and other protected-attribute signals.
Country-specific identity, tax, residency, voter, passport, and registration identifiers.
IMEI, ICCID, MAC, VIN, network, endpoint, and device identifier patterns.
Payment, banking, tax, payroll, market, and PCI-adjacent patterns.
Health identifiers, clinical codes, provider IDs, and medical records.
Non-selectable taxonomy family for credential deploy components. Select one or more child components instead.
AI prompt, agent, model, RAG, tool, policy, and AI-context security patterns.
Incident response, disaster recovery, vulnerability, risk, and security operations records.
SCADA, ICS, utilities, telecom, transport, plant, energy, water, and OT operations.
Protective markings, classification banners, and government sensitivity markings.
Cabinet, procurement, regulatory, public-sector, benefits, and official records.
Legal, court, policing, corrections, investigation, and evidence patterns.
Business, governance, audit, education, HR, IP, and operational records.
Catch-all package bucket for patterns that need manual review before a more specific package owner is chosen.
Identity, password, authentication and session material
AI/ML service keys and credentials exposed through AI workflows
Cloud control-plane and hosted platform credentials
Source control, CI/CD and package publishing credentials
Database and data-platform connection credentials
Private keys, certificates, vaults and recovery material
On-premises, endpoint, server and network credentials
Application and SaaS API credentials
Payment, merchant and commerce credentials
Digital-asset exchange and wallet secrets
Military operations, intelligence collection, defence technology, security clearances, and national-security records.
